translation.whereYouCan: where you can find anything you want.
translation.desc_p1_SobreMim: Full Stack Developer with more than 3 years of experience in corporate digital products, system integrations and cloud applications, with a focus on scalability, security and high availability.
translation.desc_p2_SobreMim: I worked as a developer at B3, delivering Internet Banking solutions with Oracle Integration Cloud, VBCS and Oracle Autonomous Database, following regulated security and governance standards.
translation.desc_p3_SobreMim: Experience with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Angular, C# and .NET, with a focus on Cloud, REST APIs, CI/CD, automated tests and Clean Architecture.
translation.desc_p4_SobreMim: In my free time, I enjoy traveling with my girlfriend, celebrating with my family, playing video games, playing the guitar and listening to music while: making food, cleaning the house or going to the gym.
translation.desc_modal1_services: Over 3 years of experience developing scalable and high-availability corporate web applications.
translation.item1_modal1_services: Front-end development with React and Angular, applying componentization, performance and responsiveness for any device;
translation.item2_modal1_services: Clean Architecture and software engineering best practices, focused on scalability and maintainability;
translation.item3_modal1_services: REST and SOAP API integration, with experience in corporate environments and financial markets;
translation.item4_modal1_services: CI/CD and version control with Git, ensuring continuous and secure deliveries in production;
translation.item5_modal1_services: Back-end development with C# and .NET, building robust REST APIs and secure corporate integrations.
translation.desc_modal2_services: Service with a beautiful interface, modern and functional is the key to keep the user inside the application, and even come back more often.
translation.item1_modal2_services: The best possible user interface and experience, following all requested standards;
translation.item2_modal2_services: Creation of icons, logos, among other design elements;
translation.item3_modal2_services: Accessibility to the project, both visually and functionally;
translation.desc_modal3_services: Experience with corporate cloud and modern DevOps practices in high-availability environments.
translation.item1_modal3_services: Development and deployment of applications on Oracle Cloud (OCI) and Azure, focused on scalability and security;
translation.item2_modal3_services: Containerization with Docker and environment orchestration for consistent production deliveries;
translation.item3_modal3_services: Creation and management of automated CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps and Oracle DevOps;
translation.item4_modal3_services: Experience with Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC) for connectivity between on-premises systems and cloud;
